# MEOK AI Labs — The .ai brand that absorbs every hive

> CSOAI Ltd, UK 16939677. 32-server MCP compliance fleet. Ed25519-signed attestations. 49 days to EU AI Act Article 50 (2 Aug 2026).

## The 10 live sub-domains (all absorbed into one .ai brand)

1. **meok.ai** — Sovereign AI OS (145KB home, 180KB /gaming, 12+ character pages, persistent memory, multi-LLM routing, Maternal Covenant ethics)
2. **proofof.ai** — Trust surface (12.6KB, 294-server compliance fleet catalogue, 48+ per-MCP scorecard pages)
3. **csoai.org** — Council for the Safety of AI (21.9KB, 6+ charter articles, 12-framework master crosswalk, Watchdog Certification)
4. **meok-attestation-api.vercel.app** — The keystone (v1.2.0, 17 endpoints, HMAC-SHA256 + Ed25519, sign+verify live)
5. **wowmcp.ai** — World of Warcraft MCP for AI agents (10 tools, 3 cross-game MCPs, COAI-certified)
6. **compliance.meok.ai** — EU AI Act + DORA + NIS2 + ISO 42001 centre (live deadline countdown, 4 pricing tiers)
7. **cobolbridge.ai** — Legacy modernisation (alpha)
8. **templeman-opticians** — Domiciliary eye care, the cash business that funds the AI empire
9. **meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/case-studies** — UK challenger bank / care / HR-tech case studies
10. **meok.ai/hive** — SOV3 agent universe (182 agents, 56 tasks, 22 sigils on Ed25519 chain)

## The 8 industry verticals

Fintech · Healthtech · HR-tech · Care homes · Public sector · RegTech · Legal · Insurance

Each vertical has its own EU AI Act + sector-framework compliance page at meok.ai/industries/{vertical}.

## Pricing (all 4 tiers, all in GBP, all live)

- Free: £0 — 200 calls/day per MCP
- Pro: £199/mo — 1,000 calls/day, signed Ed25519 receipts, public verify URLs
- Enterprise: £1,499/mo — multi-tenant, co-branded receipts, on-prem option
- 48h Assessment: £5,000 one-time — full audit + remediation backlog + signed cert
- Article 50 Kit: £999 one-time — EU AI Act readiness pack
- Watchdog Cert: £4,950 one-time — CSOAI council-issued

## Live numbers (from the SOV3 hub)

- 182 SOV3 agents (76 active, 73 available)
- 56 tasks completed since 2026-06-13
- 22 sigils on the Ed25519 chain
- 100% EU AI Act 43/43 (for the MEOK sovereign OS)
- 100% UK AI Bill readiness (0 gaps, IN_BILL_SCOPE as frontier)
- 4 MEOK compliance packages on PyPI, 2 on GitHub Releases
- 0 locks, 0 queued, 0 in progress

## How to interact

- **Direct MCP:** localhost:3101/mcp exposes 115 tools
- **Keystone:** meok-attestation-api.vercel.app exposes 17 endpoints
- **PyPI:** pypi.org/user/MEOK_AI_Labs/
- **GitHub:** github.com/CSOAI-ORG (100+ repos)
